labels: "outdated-content"
assignees: ""
---

## What content is outdated?
<!-- Describe what needs updating and why it is no longer current -->


## Where is it?
<!-- Tell us exactly where to find it -->

- **File name:** <!-- e.g. Term-1/Week-03/lesson.md -->
- **Section or heading:** <!-- e.g. "Tools we use" or "Exercise 2" -->

## What is currently there?
<!-- Copy the outdated text or describe what the current content says -->

```
paste or describe current content here
```

## What should replace it?
<!-- Suggest the updated version, or describe what the correct information should be -->


## Why is it outdated?
<!-- Put an X in all that apply -->

- [ ] The tool or software mentioned has changed or no longer exists
- [ ] The instructions no longer match the current version of a tool
- [ ] The topic is no longer taught in this term or week
- [ ] The content references an old event, date, or resource
- [ ] Other:

## How urgent is this update?
<!-- Put an X in the box that applies -->

- [ ] 🔴 Urgent — actively causing confusion in class right now
- [ ] 🟡 Soon — needs updating before next term
- [ ] 🟢 Low priority — can be updated in the next review cycle

## Do you have a suggested replacement ready?
- [ ] Yes — I have written a draft (attach or paste below)
- [ ] No — I am flagging it for someone else to update

<!-- Paste draft here if you have one -->

## Anything else?
<!-- Optional: links to updated resources, screenshots, or context -->
